name: app-detail-page
description: Detail page template for a single catalog entry: header with logo + meta + multi-arch install buttons, screenshot lightbox, markdown description, tags, full version list.
postInstall: 1. The route paths (/app/[slug] for type=apps, /game/[slug] for type=games) match the conventions used by app-card-components
2. The Screenshots component is a self-contained lightbox — Esc/arrow-keys/swipe to navigate, click backdrop to close
3. AppDetail.pickInstallables groups latest-version files by architecture and shows one Install button per arch
